title: Privilege Escalation Attempt Detected (Linux)
description: Detects Linux privilege escalation attempts (sudo -i/-s, SUID changes, pkexec abuse).
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip, username, QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%sudo -i%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%chmod 4755%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%pkexec%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 5 MINUTES
